creator: ladyandhersweetescapes
caption:
And we dined for only 125 AED each! How? Read below!

It’s Dubai Restaurant Week (April 28-May 7, 2023), and 50+ award-winning restaurants have limited edition set menus! 

Upon seeing that @pierchicdubai offers a 2-course lunch for only 125 AED, we immediately reserved a table. We have dined years ago, and it’s undoubtedly one of the most romantic date night venues we’ve been to! So we’re ecstatic to go back for lunch at a steal price! 💕

What we had:
* Complimentary bread basket
* Starters: Burrata and Panzanella
* Main course: Linguine Alle Vongole and Ravioli Ricotta 
* Complimentary dessert platter
* Bottle of water

Tag your date!
